OLLAMA_HOST: IP Address for the ollama server (default 127.0.0.1:11434)
OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE: The duration that models stay loaded in memory (default "5m")
OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS: Maximum number of loaded models per GPU
OLLAMA_MODELS: The path to the models directory
OLLAMA_NOPRUNE: Do not prune model blobs on startup
OLLAMA_ORIGINS: A comma separated list of allowed origins
OLLAMA_SCHED_SPREAD: Always schedule model across all GPUs
OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE: Quantization type for the K/V cache (default: f16)
OLLAMA_LLM_LIBRARY: Set LLM library to bypass autodetection
OLLAMA_GPU_OVERHEAD: Reserve a portion of VRAM per GPU (bytes)
OLLAMA_LOAD_TIMEOUT: How long to allow model loads to stall before giving up (default "5m")
needServiceRun: Please start the Olama service first

llmChecker.title: LLM Checker
llmChecker.serviceHint: You should go to run Ollama.
llmChecker.goToServiceTab: Click here to go to Ollama tab
llmChecker.runQualityHint: Run quality check to measure practical model quality on this PC.
llmChecker.autoBestModel: Auto best model for current filters
llmChecker.quickBenchmarkHelp: This quick benchmark is different from the top benchmark: it uses PC hardware fit analysis for local and non-local suggested models, and reuses cached real benchmark data when available.
llmChecker.tableEmptyHint: Table is empty. Click "Quick PC Benchmark" to run compatibility analysis for your PC.
llmChecker.fitNoEvidence: No benchmark evidence for this model yet on this machine.
llmChecker.fitBenchExcellent: Benchmarked on your PC: {tok} tok/s, first token {first}s.
llmChecker.fitBenchMedium: Benchmarked on your PC: usable speed ({tok} tok/s, {first}s first token).
llmChecker.fitBenchLow: Benchmarked on your PC: slow response ({tok} tok/s, {first}s first token).
llmChecker.fitEstimatedStrong: Estimated VRAM fit is strong ({vram} GB GPU vs ~{need} GB needed).
llmChecker.fitEstimatedAcceptable: Estimated VRAM fit is acceptable ({vram} GB GPU vs ~{need} GB needed).
llmChecker.fitEstimatedHighPressure: Estimated memory pressure is high ({vram} GB GPU vs ~{need} GB needed), may be slow or fallback to CPU.
llmChecker.fitInstalledSuffix: (estimated; model is installed, run top Benchmark for exact runtime numbers).
llmChecker.fitNotInstalledDowngrade: (not installed yet; downgraded one level until verified by real run).
llmChecker.fitNotInstalledEstimate: (not installed yet; quick estimate based on your PC profile).
